title: Sick Day Honey Pudding
description: A soothing and comforting dessert to help you feel better when you're not feeling well. This honey pudding is made with simple ingredients and is easy to digest.
instructions: Combine 2 tablespoons of honey with 1 cup of sick day herbal tea in a small saucepan.
Heat the mixture over low heat, stirring constantly, until the honey dissolves.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Add 1 box of vanilla pudding to the mixture and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate until chilled, at least 2 hours.
